subcodes.first_line: O people of Ha and Mim! Blessed are ye, inasmuch as ye have attained unto the Day of God and His Manifestation, have hearkened unto His Call, and have turned towards Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل ها و میم طوبی لکم بما فزتم بیوم الله و ظهوره و سمعتم ندآئه و اقبلتم
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @praise and encouragement
